jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services!
